WITH czk_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.CustomerID, y.Consumption
    FROM transactions_1k t
    INNER JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND y.Date LIKE '2013%'
    WHERE t.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM czk_customers)
),
segment_consumption AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, ft.CustomerID, SUM(ft.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM filtered_transactions ft
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ft.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY c.Segment, ft.CustomerID
),
min_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(TotalConsumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM segment_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
annual_average_consumption AS (
    SELECT sc.Segment, AVG(sc.TotalConsumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
    FROM segment_consumption sc
    INNER JOIN min_consumption_customers mcc ON sc.Segment = mcc.Segment AND sc.TotalConsumption = mcc.MinConsumption
    GROUP BY sc.Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM annual_average_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM annual_average_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM annual_average_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM annual_average_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM annual_average_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT AnnualAverageConsumption FROM annual_average_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_Difference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH YearlyConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2013
    FROM 
        customers c
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Currency = 'EUR'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
PercentageChange AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        ((Consumption2013 - Consumption2012) * 100.0 / Consumption2013) AS PercentageChange
    FROM 
        YearlyConsumption
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    MAX(PercentageChange) AS MaxPercentageChange,
    MIN(PercentageChange) AS MinPercentageChange
FROM 
    PercentageChange
GROUP BY 
    Segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

      CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(champion.time, INSTR(champion.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(champion.time, INSTR(champion.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1) AS REAL)) -
     (CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, 1, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') + 1), ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +
      CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') + 1), INSTR(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') + 1), ':') + 1) AS REAL))) /
    (CAST(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, 1, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') + 1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(last_driver.time, INSTR(last_driver.time, ':') + 1), ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +
